rationale: Internal refactor moving types to com.mongodb.internal; API packaging change, no spec behavior involved.
3.x API change returning null WriteResult; internal API behavior change from 2.x, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Aligning option class names between sync and async APIs; internal API inconsistency, not spec-related.
API shape improvement returning MongoIterable; no spec rule contradicted.
Internal refactor renaming operation and returning BatchCursor; no spec behavior involved.
API ergonomics improvement for async cursor cancellation via Future; no spec rule contradicted.
NPE from missing versionArray in MongoDB 1.8 isMaster response; implementation compatibility bug, no specific spec rule named.
Internal API/architecture improvement to make BsonDocumentCodec implement CollectibleCodec; no spec rule involved.
Java generics API improvement for aggregate/insert parameters; language-binding ergonomics, not spec.
Documentation update noting MongoClient no longer throws UnknownHostException; docs only.
Removing checkstyle exclusion; build/code quality, no spec behavior involved.
Filtering cursor bug in ListCollectionsOperation; internal implementation bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
DBCursor.getQuery regression returning copy instead of reference; internal API behavior, not a spec rule.
Documentation/config update replacing version references; docs only.
Performance tuning raising minHeartbeatFrequency default to reduce load; no specific SDAM spec rule contradicted.
NPE from ServerAddressSelector returning null element when server removed from cluster; internal implementation bug.
Race condition: auth fails when seed list hosts replaced by discovered hosts during handshake; implementation concurrency bug.
API shape change to return MongoIterable from distinct; no spec rule contradicted.
Migrating QuickTour examples to 3.0.0; documentation only.
Adding batchSize to MongoIterable API; ergonomics improvement, no spec rule involved.
Making MongoIterable methods fluent; API ergonomics, no spec behavior involved.
Description explicitly states c-driver and csharp-driver handle zero-length array keys; Java throws exception decoding same BSON.
Erroneous @Deprecated annotation on localThreshold(); copy-paste mistake, no spec behavior involved.
Documentation improvement for maxWaitTime default and valid range; docs only.
Internal API change to use BsonDocument in async listDatabaseNames; no spec rule contradicted.
User misuse of deprecated $query operator; error is server-side rejection, not a driver spec deviation.
CollectibleCodec API design issue expecting mutable documents; internal design, no spec rule violated.
API ergonomics improvement for changing codec registries; no spec behavior involved.
GridFS spec requires lookup by '_id'; driver uses wrong field 'objectId', breaking findOne(ObjectId) with a typo.
New Bson interface for type-safe API; architectural improvement, no spec rule involved.
Adding maxTime property to findAnd* options; API completeness improvement, no spec rule contradicted.
Explicitly about implementing tests from the server selection specification test suite.
Tag values stored as 'BsonString{value=...}' objects instead of plain strings; server-selection tag matching fails per spec.
OSGi MANIFEST.MF missing javax.net.SocketFactory import; packaging bug, no spec behavior involved.
LazyBsonObject.entrySet/keySet NPE on null values; internal implementation bug, no BSON spec rule specifically contradicted.
Documentation reminder ticket to link new features to MongoDB manual; docs only.
CodecRegistry resolution bug where child registry ignores outer registry codecs; internal codec architecture bug.
OSGi bundle import-package version range issue; packaging/deployment bug, no spec behavior involved.
Summary explicitly says 'Comply with index management specification'; driver deviating from index management spec requirements.
TLS spec requires hostname verification; driver SSL connections skip certificate hostname validation by default.
Adding parse() methods to Document class to match BsonDocument API; ergonomics improvement, no spec rule involved.
StringRangeSet.isEmpty() hardwired to false; internal collection bug, no specific BSON spec rule contradicted.
Dependency version bump to Netty 4.0.26.FINAL; no spec behavior involved.
Javadoc typo fix: 'mongo' should be 'mongoClient'; documentation only.
Adding toString() methods to result classes; API ergonomics, no spec rule involved.
Race conditions in InternalStreamConnection async operations; internal concurrency bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Broken hyperlink in API documentation for JsonMode enum; docs only.
JsonReader fails on ISODate with space-separated format; parsing bug but no specific BSON spec rule named.
Removing stream close responsibility from BsonBinaryReader/Writer; API design improvement, no spec rule involved.
OSGi MANIFEST.MF missing javax.crypto imports needed for SCRAM-SHA1; packaging bug, not a spec nonconformance.
